• Working as an AI Software Specialist, currently early in the role and ramping up
  • Applying automation and full-stack skills from prior internship experience to new production work

• Engineered AI agent orchestration workflows using n8n, integrating LLM and LAM models into live production environments
  • Collaborated with MPC to deliver 4 specialized automation workflows for Mydin (HR, Marketing, Customer Service, and Operations), integrating with their Lark ecosystem
  • Led technical requirement gathering and mapped logic blueprints for an HR Digital Worker presented to the IJN Board of Directors to automate operational bottlenecks
  • Maintained the LekirCash fintech ecosystem, managing secure full-stack updates, transaction flow UX via Adobe products, and version control via Git/GitHub

• Maintained high operational standards in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment, ensuring 100% compliance with rigorous hygiene and safety protocols
  • Optimized workflow efficiency during peak service hours to meet strict service-level targets, demonstrating the same discipline required for technical project deadlines

• Facilitated end-to-end production cycles for traditional food products, ensuring quality control and consistency across manufacturing workflows
  • Managed resource allocation and agricultural maintenance tasks, gaining early exposure to logistics, supply chain efficiency, and inventory management
